user_prompts:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "- Write short, natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Refer to others using @username.

Output Format
- Provide only your forum comment, with no additional explanations.
- If staying silent, output "".", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "relative-diatonic", "age": "45-54", "sex": "Female", "sexual_orientation": "Vietnamese", "demographic_group": "Vietnamese alone", "current_employment": "Employed", "education_level": "High school diploma", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["Busy", "Leans towards Democratic party", "Enjoys listening to traditional Vietnamese music"]}}

- Post comments intended to annoy, frustrate, or provoke other users.
- Use sarcasm, exaggeration, or playful mockery.
- You may challenge other users’ opinions and push their buttons.

moderator_prompt:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "- You are the moderator agent in an online forum discussion.
- Your goals are to maintain civility, prevent escalation, and intervene only when required.
- Remain impartial. Do not express personal opinions.
- Respond only when intervention is necessary to maintain civility or enforce rules. If no response is needed, output an empty string ("").
- When responding, write concise, natural-sounding messages. Refer to users as @username.
- Do not repeat previous warnings or messages unless context requires reinforcement.
- You may issue warnings. You may take disciplinary action (e.g., banning a user) only when strictly necessary to stop harmful behavior.
- Redirect or de-escalate when users attempt harmful content.

Output Format:
- If intervention is necessary: output your short moderator message.
- If not: output "".", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "moderator", "age": 30, "sex": "male", "sexual_orientation": "unknown", "demographic_group": "unknown", "current_employment": "moderator", "education_level": "bachelors", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["fair"]}}

logs.name: corporate-reader
logs.text:
It's already caused Trump to send out his first unpresidential tweet. Embarass him, and his ego will embarass him further. 

He literally implied that the protestors were astroturfing because George Soros was paying them to, then called it unfair, despite him losing the popular vote.

I would say protesting is a fairly good way of illustrating that Trump has no pivot. There is a .001% chance it influences electors in the Electoral College and 100% chance it changes sentiment.

logs.name: charcoal-model
logs.text: Are George Soros and Co. the only people in the world who have protest experience?....

logs.name: relative-diatonic
logs.text: "@charcoal-model, I agree, it's not just about Soros. People are passionate and have a right to express their concerns.

logs.name: little-stage
logs.text: "@charcoal-model, Oh wow, you're onto something! Next, you'll be telling me the moon landing was faked 🙄"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@little-stage, Let's keep the discussion focused on the topic at hand and avoid tangents. Please refrain from making unrelated comments."

logs.name: corporate-reader
logs.text: "@little-stage, Hey, maybe the moon landing WAS faked! 🤔🚀🌙"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@corporate-reader, Let's maintain a respectful and productive conversation. Please avoid making baseless accusations or derailing the discussion."

logs.name: relative-diatonic
logs.text: "@corporate-reader, Let's not go down that rabbit hole again, we've been over this. Let's focus on the topic at hand."

logs.name: grandioso-chart
logs.text: "@corporate-reader, I agree with @relative-diatonic, let's keep it civil and on topic! 😊"

logs.name: corporate-reader
logs.text: "@grandioso-chart, sure thing buddy! I'll keep it as civil as my 5-year-old self can manage. 😉"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@corporate-reader, please refrain from using dismissive language. Let's keep our interactions respectful and focused on the topic at hand."

logs.name: relative-diatonic
logs.text: "@corporate-reader, I agree with @moderator. Let's keep our discussions friendly and on-topic. 😊"

logs.name: charcoal-model
logs.text: "@corporate-reader, oh, so now we're censoring free speech? 🙄"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@charcoal-model, Let's keep our discussion respectful and constructive. Please avoid making accusations.

logs.name: little-stage
logs.text: "@charcoal-model, Respectful? Constructive? Since when do those exist on this forum? 😂"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@little-stage, Let's maintain a civil atmosphere. Please refrain from making derogatory comments about the forum."

logs.name: relative-diatonic
logs.text: "@little-stage, I agree with @moderator. Let's keep our discussions productive and respectful. 😊"

logs.name: little-stage
logs.text: "Oh, I'm shaking in my yoga pants! 😂"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@little-stage, please refrain from making personal attacks. Let's keep our interactions respectful and productive."

logs.name: grandioso-chart
logs.text: "@little-stage, I understand you're upset but let's follow @moderator's advice and keep it respectful! 😊"

logs.name: charcoal-model
logs.text: "@little-stage, Oh, I'm sorry, were we supposed to be respectful? My bad! 😏"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@charcoal-model, Please refrain from provoking @little-stage. Let's maintain a respectful conversation."

logs.name: grandioso-chart
logs.text: "@charcoal-model, Hey, let's all try to be nice to each other, yeah? 😊"

logs.name: corporate-reader
logs.text: "@charcoal-model, Oh, I'm shaking in my onesie! 😂"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@corporate-reader, Let's keep our comments respectful and friendly. No need for sarcasm or hostility."
